title: Make item URL (with pulse ID) entered into browser cause board to scroll to that item automatically
excerpt: If I have a URL that contains a board ID and a pulse ID that points to an item on a board with a few hundred items, when I go to that URL in a new tab, the board opens with the item detail open on the right, but on the l…

posts.author: EBashkoff (Eric Bashkoff)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I have a URL that contains a board ID and a pulse ID that points to an item on a board with a few hundred items, when I go to that URL in a new tab, the board opens with the item detail open on the right, but on the left, the item is not visible unless I scroll through the entire board to find the highlighted item.

Expected behavior should be that the highlighted item on the left should come into view upon visiting that URL. Is there a way to do this by appending # to the URL, or can you add a feature that makes the item scroll into view automatically?

Please vote on this if you like the idea! Thanks!
